steps.title: Use the time concern
steps.content: Researchers worry that the longer a species has been extinct, the less likely it is that a suitable habitat still exists. The most concerning candidate is therefore the one that has been extinct the longest.

steps.title: Compare extinction timing
steps.content: Choice A describes a species extinct only a few years after the huia, and choice D gives the recent date 1952. Choice C conflicts with the table's ordering by claiming the woolly mammoth became extinct before the saber-toothed cat. The remaining choice identifies a species extinct 11,000 years ago. The answer is B.
